title: rhodanthemum arundanum subsp. arundanum
intro: Rhodanthemum arundanum subsp. arundanum, also known as the Andalusian Rhodanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rhodanthemum arundanum subsp. arundanum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce menstrual cramps, and act as an antispasmodic agent. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
